title: eruca sativa var. longirostris
intro: Eruca sativa var. longirostris, also known as rocket longirostris or long-beaked rocket, is a plant species belonging to the Brassicaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Eruca sativa var. longirostris include its potential in reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. This plant can be used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular choice in herbal medicine.
